gravity_link: Essential for proprioception, which provides the gravity reference frame for posture control.
spine_curvature_link: Loss of function mutations cause congenital scoliosis; asymmetric expression in paraspinal muscles in AIS. (DOI: 10.1056/NEJMoa1602812)
justification: Direct link between gravity sensing (proprioception) and spinal alignment.

gravity_link: Regulates migration of muscle precursors and formation of dorsal horn neurons involved in proprioception/gravity sensing.
spine_curvature_link: Top GWAS hit for Adolescent Idiopathic Scoliosis (AIS). (DOI: 10.1038/ng.814)
justification: Major genetic driver of AIS with clear mechanistic link to postural tone.

gravity_link: Nuclear translocation is directly regulated by mechanical stiffness and gravity loading forces.
spine_curvature_link: Regulates osteoblast differentiation and vertebral growth; deletion leads to skeletal defects.
justification: Central hub of cellular mechanotransduction.

gravity_link: Paralog of YAP, acts as a mechanosensor of matrix stiffness and gravity-derived stress.
spine_curvature_link: Essential for skeletal development; deficiency causes osteopenia and spinal deformities.
justification: Key partner of YAP in mechanosensing.

gravity_link: Ciliary function is critical for detecting fluid flow and potentially gravity vectors (statocysts analogy).
spine_curvature_link: Mutations found in familial AIS; causes ciliary defects and spinal curvature in zebrafish. (DOI: 10.1172/JCI77262)
justification: Direct genetic cause of scoliosis linked to ciliary geometry.

gravity_link: GPR126 is a mechanosensitive GPCR; essential for intervertebral disc maintenance under mechanical load.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations associated with AIS; required for spinal alignment in zebrafish. (DOI: 10.1016/j.neuron.2014.05.022)
justification: Mechanosensitive receptor directly linked to spine integrity.

gravity_link: Planar Cell Polarity (PCP) aligns cells against tissue stress lines (gravity).
spine_curvature_link: Rare variants associated with AIS; essential for vertebral shape. (DOI: 10.1371/journal.pgen.1002843)
justification: PCP pathway is fundamental to body axis linearity.

gravity_link: Regulates convergent extension movements, resisting gravity-induced spreading.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause scoliosis in zebrafish and are found in AIS patients. (DOI: 10.1038/ncomms1352)
justification: Core PCP component linked to spinal curvature.

gravity_link: Major structural component resisting compressive gravity loads in spine.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause spondyloepiphyseal dysplasia and scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1002/humu.1380020102)
justification: Primary gravity-resisting molecule in the spine.

gravity_link: Cartilage Oligomeric Matrix Protein; organizes collagen to resist load.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Pseudoachondroplasia with associated spinal curvature.
justification: Critical for matrix integrity under load.

gravity_link: Kinesin motor for ciliary transport; cilia are potential gravity sensors.
spine_curvature_link: Associated with AIS susceptibility. (DOI: 10.1093/hmg/ddq172)
justification: Ciliary motor protein linked to scoliosis.

gravity_link: Mechanosensitive ion channel activated by osmotic and mechanical stress (gravity load).
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause metatropic dysplasia and scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1038/ng.667)
justification: Direct mechanosensor in chondrocytes.

gravity_link: Detects cerebrospinal fluid flow in central canal; flow dynamics are gravity-influenced.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause scoliosis in zebrafish and humans. (DOI: 10.1038/s41467-018-06283-3)
justification: Links CSF flow sensing to spine straightness.

gravity_link: Regulates somite segmentation clock; timing errors lead to hemivertebrae.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Congenital Scoliosis (CS). (DOI: 10.1056/NEJMoa1405829)
justification: Fundamental to vertebral segmentation symmetry.

gravity_link: Perlecan; mechanosensor in lacuno-canalicular system of bone.
spine_curvature_link: Deficiency leads to Schwartz-Jampel syndrome with skeletal abnormalities (kyphoscoliosis).
justification: Key mechanosensory ECM component.

gravity_link: Secreted glycoprotein; modulates BMP signaling in osteogenesis.
spine_curvature_link: Overexpression implicated in high bone mass and potential structural anomalies.
justification: Emerging candidate in bone morphogenesis.

gravity_link: BMP antagonist; balances proliferation/differentiation in growth plate under load.
spine_curvature_link: Variants linked to bone density and potentially structural defects.
justification: Regulates growth plate sensitivity.

gravity_link: Forms filamentous networks in cartilage; contributes to stiffness.
spine_curvature_link: Linked to idiopathic scoliosis susceptibility in some populations. (DOI: 10.1016/j.ygeno.2007.03.010)
justification: Structural component of cartilage matrix.

gravity_link: Hox genes specify vertebral identity along the A-P axis (gravity axis).
spine_curvature_link: Disruption leads to vertebral patterning defects.
justification: Positional identity gene.

gravity_link: Wnt signaling responds to mechanical load (osteocyte mechanotransduction).
spine_curvature_link: Crucial for bone mass regulation and vertebral formation.
justification: Key signaling pathway in bone mechanobiology.

gravity_link: Integrins are the primary cellular gravity/load sensors via focal adhesions.
spine_curvature_link: Conditional deletion in cartilage leads to scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1073/pnas.1513252112)
justification: Primary gravity sensor at cell-ECM interface.

gravity_link: Central mediator of integrin mechanotransduction and gravity response.
spine_curvature_link: Essential for osteoblast response to load; deletion affects bone formation.
justification: Key signal transducer for gravity sensing.

gravity_link: Actin cytoskeleton crosslinker, responds to mechanical stress.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Spondylocarpotarsal Synostosis Syndrome with scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1038/ng1319)
justification: Structural integrator of stress and segmentation.

gravity_link: Mechanosensitive ion channel in cilia (flow/bending).
spine_curvature_link: Partner of PKD1L1; essential for left-right asymmetry and spine straightness in zebrafish.
justification: Ciliary mechanosensor linked to asymmetry.

gravity_link: PCP pathway component aligning tissues against stress.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause neural tube defects; PCP is key for spine straightening.
justification: PCP determinant of tissue polarity.

gravity_link: Regulates somite boundary formation (the 'clock'), establishing structural units.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Spondylocostal Dysostosis (severe spinal malformation). (DOI: 10.1086/302826)
justification: Critical for vertebral segmentation integrity.

gravity_link: Notch signaling component for segmentation.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Spondylocostal Dysostosis. (DOI: 10.1038/ng0502-385)
justification: Notch ligand essential for somite boundaries.

gravity_link: Notochord (hydrostatic skeleton) secretion; provides initial gravity resistance.
spine_curvature_link: Modulation affects vertebral shape and disc formation. VACTERL syndrome.
justification: Morphogen establishing the gravity axis.

gravity_link: Microfibrils provide long-range elasticity and sequester TGF-beta, responding to tissue stretch.
spine_curvature_link: Marfan syndrome patients have high prevalence of scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1056/NEJMoa1000501)
justification: Major structural determinant of spine elasticity.

gravity_link: Cell-cell adhesion, transmits tension across tissues.
spine_curvature_link: Asymmetric expression implicated in curvature.
justification: Transmits mechanical information between cells.

gravity_link: Master osteogenic factor; expression is upregulated by mechanical load (gravity).
spine_curvature_link: Cleidocranial dysplasia involves spinal abnormalities; essential for vertebral ossification.
justification: Master regulator of bone response to load.

gravity_link: Nucleates collagen fibril assembly, determining fiber diameter and mechanical strength.
spine_curvature_link: Stickler syndrome (Type II) causes scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1002/ajmg.1320570103)
justification: Controls collagen fibril mechanics.

gravity_link: Nuclear lamina stiffness scales with tissue stiffness and gravity load; mutations disrupt mechanotransduction.
spine_curvature_link: Laminopathies (e.g. EDMD, Progeria) frequently present with scoliosis and skeletal deformities. (DOI: 10.1038/s41576-018-0063-2)
justification: Nuclear mechanosensor essential for structural integrity.

gravity_link: Expression is upregulated by mechanical compression; master chondrogenic factor.
spine_curvature_link: Campomelic Dysplasia (SOX9 mutation) features bowing of long bones and scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1038/ng0595-19)
justification: Master regulator of chondrogenesis and vertebral formation.

gravity_link: Provides osmotic swelling pressure to resist compressive gravity loads in spine.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Spondyloepiphyseal Dysplasia, Kimberly type, with short stature and lordosis. (DOI: 10.1002/art.24564)
justification: Primary provider of compressive resistance in the disc.

gravity_link: Key Wnt co-receptor for osteocyte mechanotransduction (gravity sensing).
spine_curvature_link: Loss of function causes Osteoporosis-Pseudoglioma Syndrome with kyphoscoliosis. (DOI: 10.1056/NEJMoa013444)
justification: Critical for bone's adaptive response to load.

gravity_link: Primary structural component resisting gravity; remodels under load.
spine_curvature_link: Baraitser-Winter syndrome (ACTB mutation) includes kyphoscoliosis. (DOI: 10.1038/ng.1069)
justification: Fundamental cytoskeletal element for cell mechanics.

gravity_link: PCP signaling aligns cells; critical for neural tube closure against stress.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause severe neural tube defects and spinal misalignment in mice (Looptail). (DOI: 10.1126/science.1075620)
justification: PCP core component partnering with VANGL1.

gravity_link: Oscillatory expression defines somite timing.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Spondylocostal Dysostosis (SCD) with hemivertebrae. (DOI: 10.1038/nature06498)
justification: Driver of the segmentation clock.

gravity_link: Modulates Notch signaling in the segmentation clock.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Spondylocostal Dysostosis type 3. (DOI: 10.1086/426460)
justification: Critical modulator of segmentation timing.

gravity_link: Unfolds under force to recruit vinculin; primary cellular mechanosensor.
spine_curvature_link: Osteoblast-specific deletion results in osteopenia and kyphosis. (DOI: 10.1371/journal.pgen.1009146)
justification: Direct force transmission link.

gravity_link: Basolateral polarity determinant; integrates mechanical cues.
spine_curvature_link: Circletail mouse (Scrib mutant) has severe craniorachischisis (open spine). (DOI: 10.1126/science.1075620)
justification: PCP determinant essential for axis formation.

gravity_link: Regulates somite boundaries.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations associated with vertebral segmentation defects (SCD). (DOI: 10.1016/j.ajhg.2015.01.006)
justification: Terminator of the segmentation clock.

gravity_link: Primary mechanosensor in vascular and bone cells.
spine_curvature_link: Gain of function causes generalized lymphatic dysplasia; bone role emerging. (DOI: 10.1038/nature09431)
justification: Partner to PIEZO2 in mechanosensing.

gravity_link: Links cytoskeleton to membrane; crucial for sensory neuron stability.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Hereditary Sensory and Autonomic Neuropathy type VI with severe spinal deformities. (DOI: 10.1093/hmg/ddr580)
justification: Structural linker essential for proprioceptors.

gravity_link: Mechanosensitive regulator of chondrocyte hypertrophy.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Brachydactyly type A1; essential for vertebral growth rates. (DOI: 10.1038/ng767)
justification: Regulates growth plate mechanics.

gravity_link: Regulates PCP; involved in tissue polarity.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations linked to human neural tube defects and scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1016/j.ajhg.2011.06.012)
justification: PCP component linked to spinal defects.

gravity_link: Transmits tension at adherens junctions; Wnt effector.
spine_curvature_link: Conditional deletion in osteoblasts causes osteoporosis and spinal fracture. (DOI: 10.1084/jem.20021669)
justification: Key node in Wnt and adhesion signaling.

gravity_link: Potent inducer of bone formation; upregulated by weight-bearing.
spine_curvature_link: Recombinant BMP2 used in spinal fusion; naturally regulates vertebral growth. (DOI: 10.1002/jbm.a.30708)
justification: Major bone morphogen.

gravity_link: Recruited to focal adhesions under tension; essential for force transmission.
spine_curvature_link: Loss leads to cardiac and skeletal muscle defects. (DOI: 10.1083/jcb.200004060)
justification: Structural reinforcement of adhesions.

gravity_link: Essential for joint formation; expression responds to mechanical load.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause chondrodysplasias with spinal involvement. (DOI: 10.1038/ng0594-85)
justification: Joint and growth plate regulator.

gravity_link: Releases ATP in response to mechanical strain.
spine_curvature_link: Regulates chondrocyte proliferation and osteoblast differentiation. (DOI: 10.1083/jcb.200908051)
justification: Mechanosensitive release channel.
